# Opera Sacra — llms.txt

> A sacred arts framework by Michael Barnaba mapping 15 chakra centers (7 personal + 8 spiritual) to divine harmonic theory, sacred geometry, and ancient sound healing. Built on the philosophical lineage of Pythagoras, Plato, Boethius, Kepler, and Fludd — cross-referenced with LIGO gravitational wave physics and Schumann Resonance.

## About
- [Opera Sacra](https://opera-sacra.com): Main site — The Divine Accord system

## Free Resources
- [Divine Accord Map](https://operasacra.gumroad.com/l/sacred-arts-chakra-map): Free 15-chakra PDF download — all centers, all fires, all harmonic intervals on one page

## Book
- [Sacred Arts Blueprint](https://operasacra.gumroad.com/l/sacred-arts-blueprint): 94-page ebook by Michael Barnaba, $38.88 — instant PDF download
